deposit_required_notice_body: This business requires a boarding deposit. If online payment is not active for this business, confirm that the deposit has already been handled before you submit the reservation.
no_boarding_addons_available: No boarding add-ons are currently available.
pricing_summary_body: This estimate follows the business rules set in Boarding & Daycare Business Settings and the detailed boarding pricing page. Actual pickup or drop-off changes later can change the final total.
pricing_note_membership_full: The selected membership covers the boarding stay itself. Extra add-ons and odd-hours fees are still billed separately.
pricing_note_membership_partial: The selected membership only covers part of the stay, so this estimate bills only the uncovered boarding nights. Extra add-ons and odd-hours fees are still billed separately.
pricing_note_membership_purchase_today: If you buy a membership with this booking, the membership price is charged today in addition to any boarding deposit due today.
pricing_note_manual_discount_review: This client has discount rules that are marked for manual review, so they are not automatically included in this estimate.
pricing_note_deposit_rule: The deposit shown here follows the deposit rule and included charge categories this business selected in Boarding & Daycare Business Settings.
payment_processing_failed: Payment processing failed. Please try again.
reservation_submitted: Your reservation has been submitted! You can view your reservation in Upcoming Appointments!
error_submitting_reservation: There was an error submitting your reservation.
waiver_required_message: You must sign the waiver before booking.
waiver_required_warning: A signed waiver is required before you can book.
waiver_checkbox_label: I agree to this facility’s terms and conditions.
waiver_agreement_failed: Failed to save waiver. Please try again.
duplicate_boarding_message: One or more of your selected pets already has a reservation that overlaps these dates for this business.
capacity_block_message: This business can host up to {capacity} pets per night. The following nights would exceed capacity: {dates}.
after_hours_fee_may_apply_suffix: After Hours. Additional Fee May Apply
before_hours_pickup_fee_may_apply_suffix: Before Hours. Additional Fee May Apply
early_dropoff_fee_may_apply_suffix: Early Drop-Off. Additional Fee May Apply
after_hours_dropoff_fee_may_apply_suffix: After Hours Drop-Off. Additional Fee May Apply
selected_date_is_blackout: Sorry, this date is unavailable. Please choose a different day.
boarding_blackout_overlap_forbidden: This reservation cannot overlap with blackout dates set by the business.
membership_purchase_requires_boarding_pa: This business must enable boarding pay-at-booking before clients can buy a membership during boarding booking.
membership_purchase_boarding_not_support: Buying a new membership during boarding booking is not supported yet.
membership_purchase_complete_payment_fir: Complete payment before submitting a boarding reservation that includes a membership purchase.
membership_selected_plan_unavailable: The selected membership plan is no longer available. Please refresh and try again.
membership_purchase_save_failed_after_su: Your reservation was submitted, but the new membership purchase could not be saved automatically.
membership_selected_purchase_unavailable: The selected membership is no longer available. Please refresh and try again.
membership_balance_insufficient_boarding: The selected membership no longer has any boarding nights remaining for this reservation.
membership_balance_update_failed_after_s: Your reservation was submitted, but the membership balance could not be updated automatically.
